title: Buttery Buttermoskovskiy Pilaf
description: A rich and flavorful Ukrainian dish featuring dried fruits, blanched almonds, and a touch of sweetness to cater to diabetic-friendly preferences.

ingredients.name: 1 tablespoon honey or stevia for sweetness
Pinch of salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Toast quinoa in a dry skillet until lightly golden, about 2 minutes.
Combine toasted quinoa, cranberries, almonds, and butter in a mixing bowl. Mix well to coat evenly.
Sauté garlic in the remaining tablespoon of butter until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Add sautéed garlic to the mixing bowl with other ingredients, stir gently to combine.
Pour mixture into an oven-safe glass dish or shallow baking pan and bake for 25 minutes, or until fruits are tender but not mushy.
Serve warm. Adjust sweetness level according to taste.
Optional: Sprinkle additional blanched almonds on top before serving.
